title: A Powerful Stand for Justice

The US Olympic Committee suspended the runners, but their message of equality echoed far beyond the stadium.

Céspedes played for several teams in Major League Baseball, including the Boston Red Sox and New York Mets. His talent earned him All-Star honors and prestigious awards like the Gold Glove.
activity_question: Which team did Yoenis Céspedes play for?
follow_up_question: What position did Céspedes play in baseball?

title: Cnut's Victory Shapes England's Fate
story: Swords clashed and shields splintered as Danish and Saxon armies faced off. In 1016, on October 18, the Battle of Assandun changed England's future. Danish leader Cnut and his forces triumphed over the Saxon army led by Edmund Ironside. This decisive victory marked the end of the Danish conquest of England, shaping the country's path for years to come.
activity_question: Who led the Danish forces to victory at the Battle of Assandun?
follow_up_question: What do you think life was like for people in England after the Danish conquest?

title: Shaken City: Basel's Big Quake
story: The ground rumbled and buildings crumbled. In 1356, on October 18, the city of Basel in Switzerland faced its biggest challenge yet. A powerful earthquake, the strongest ever recorded north of the Alps, struck without warning. It shook the medieval city to its core, toppling towers and cracking walls. Despite the destruction, the resilient people of Basel banded together to rebuild their beloved home.
activity_question: What was Basel's biggest challenge in 1356?
follow_up_question: How do you think people in Basel might have helped each other after the earthquake?
